summary: UI Refinements for CapyMatch Support Pod and Mission Control - All 4 refinements verified and working correctly. (1) Reduced repetition: StatusIntelligence shows authoritative status, ActionBar is now compact. (2) 'Also worth watching (N)' label replaces 'N additional signals detected'. (3) Journey badges use calm styling, Attention badges use bold styling. (4) +N more buttons have chevron icons and are clearly interactive.
critical_code_review_comments: StatusIntelligence.js: Eye icon correctly imported from lucide-react, 'Also worth watching (N)' label with Show/Hide toggle implemented correctly
SupportPod.js: ActionBar is compact (54.5px height) with just issue title + Send Message + Resolve buttons - no longer duplicates the alert panel content
RosterSection.js: +N more buttons use ChevronDown/ChevronUp icons with proper lucide-react class 'lucide lucide-chevron-down w-2.5 h-2.5'
Header badge correctly derives from attention_status.primary instead of old pod_health field
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI refinements iteration_145 verified: (1) StatusIntelligence shows Journey (left, calm teal) + Attention (right, bold red/orange) two-column layout. (2) ActionBar is compact (~54px height) showing issue title + Send Message + Resolve buttons. (3) 'Also worth watching (N)' with Eye icon and Show/Hide toggle replaces old 'N additional signals detected' label. (4) +N more buttons have ChevronDown icons (lucide-chevron-down class). (5) Expanded secondary signals show left border-l-2 style. (6) Color-coded nature tags (Follow-up orange, At Risk red). (7) Header badge title shows attention status ('Blocker', 'At Risk', 'On Track') not old pod_health.
